name: invoiceflow-mcp
description: AI invoice automation with PDF generation, AI late-payment risk scoring, smart reminder escalation via SendGrid, and platform-agnostic payment reconciliation. 10 tools, 4 resources, 3 prompts.

invoice_demo_seed.description: Seed demo clients + invoices (various payment statuses, risk tiers, overdue states) so every downstream tool returns meaningful output without SendGrid / Stripe credentials.

client_manage.description: Create or update a client profile. Fields: name, email, phone, address, tax_id, payment_terms (net 15/30/60), currency. Tracks aggregate payment history (on-time count, late count, avg delay) used by invoice_risk.

invoice_create.description: Generate a new invoice with line items, tax, discounts, due date, and 10-currency support (USD/EUR/GBP/CAD/AUD/JPY/CHF/TRY/BRL/INR). Auto-numbers as INV-YYYY-NNNN. Returns the Invoice record plus rendered PDF buffer.

invoice_list.description: Filter and paginate invoices by status, client_id, amount range, date range, or overdue flag. Pagination: limit (default 20, max 100) and offset. Sorted by created_at desc.

invoice_send.description: Email invoice PDF to client via SendGrid (requires SENDGRID_API_KEY). Updates status to sent and records sent_at timestamp. Without SendGrid, returns a stub success so flows stay testable.

invoice_mark_paid.description: Mark an invoice as paid (full or partial). Updates amount_paid, paid_at, and rolls stats into the client's payment history (on-time/late delta based on paid_at vs due_date).

invoice_remind.description: Send an escalating payment reminder — gentle / firm / final — based on days overdue and the risk tier from invoice_risk. Increments reminder_count. Supports custom message override.

invoice_risk.description: AI-powered late-payment risk score (0-100) using 4 weighted factors: invoice amount (20%), client history (35%), due date proximity (30%), prior reminders (15%). Returns risk_level (low/medium/high), factor breakdown, recommended action, next reminder date.

cashflow_report.description: Cash flow analytics: total invoiced, collected, outstanding, overdue, collection rate %, 30-day projection, per-client breakdown. Date-range filterable.

payment_reconcile.description: Match an incoming payment (amount + payer email, optionally payment_method label and reference) to the most likely invoice. Auto-marks as paid when confidence is high. Platform-agnostic — works with CSV imports, webhook payloads, or manual entry.
